case_title: FOLIO3 SOFTWARE, INC. VS. SOPRIS SYSTEMS, LLC
cause_of_action: PETITION RE: ARBITRATION (PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD)

docket_entries.description: COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR (TRANSACTION ID # 100039615) FILED BY PETITIONER FOLIO3 SOFTWARE, INC.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100052351)
PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER FOLIO3 SOFTWARE, INC. AS TO RESPONDENT SOPRIS SYSTEMS, LLC JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER FOLIO3 SOFTWARE, INC. RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT SOPRIS SYSTEMS, LLC $96,417.25 PRINCIPAL, $540.00 COSTS, $2,150.00 REIMBURSE ADMINISTRATIVE FEES FROM RESPONDENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $99,107.25, SEE SCANNED DOC
ORDER GRANTING PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD
NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD (TRANSACTION ID # 100039615) FILED BY PETITIONER FOLIO3 SOFTWARE, INC. HEARING SET FOR JUL-26-2018 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER FOLIO3 SOFTWARE, INC.'S PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER AND JUDGMENT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR# 8600 =302/HK
